sizing_rule.note: Van Tharp 1R concept: risk fixed dollar amount per trade (1% of account = $100–$250 range for $25k account). Dollar-amount stops are psychologically anchored and less predictable. Stop width typically 2–3 ATR or fixed $100–$300.

source_rule_text: A trader should use dollar-amount stops (fixed loss tolerance) rather than percentage or technical stops because they are psychologically easier to commit to beforehand and are less predictable to other market participants.
